Title: No double-booking of same provider in overlapping slot
Preconditions: Provider has an existing confirmed appointment 10:00-10:30
Test_Steps: 1. Open appointment scheduling | 2. Select same provider | 3. Attempt to book 10:15-10:45 overlapping slot | 4. Save
Expected_Result: Booking is rejected with a clear slot-conflict message; no overlapping appointment is persisted

Title: Adjacent non-overlapping slots are both allowed
Preconditions: Provider has appointment ending exactly at 10:30
Test_Steps: 1. Book 10:00-10:30 | 2. Book 10:30-11:00 for same provider | 3. Save both
Expected_Result: Both appointments are accepted; touching boundary at 10:30 is not treated as overlap

Title: Reject future date of birth on registration
Test_Steps: 1. Start new patient registration | 2. Enter a DOB in the future | 3. Attempt to advance/save
Expected_Result: Registration is blocked with a future-DOB validation error; record is not created

Title: Accept DOB equal to today (boundary)
Test_Steps: 1. Start registration | 2. Enter DOB = today | 3. Save
Expected_Result: Newborn registration with DOB today is accepted and age computes as 0 days

Title: Required address field cannot be empty when configured mandatory
Preconditions: Address configured as required in registration app
Test_Steps: 1. Enter name, gender, DOB | 2. Leave address blank | 3. Attempt to save
Expected_Result: Save is blocked with a required-field error on address; patient not persisted

Title: Duplicate patient detection on near-identical demographics
Preconditions: An existing patient John Synth DOB 1980-05-05 male exists
Test_Steps: 1. Register a new patient with same name, DOB and gender | 2. Trigger duplicate check | 3. Review potential duplicates
Expected_Result: System surfaces the existing patient as a potential duplicate before final create

Title: Pairwise demographics combinations validation
Test_Steps: 1. Apply paired combinations of gender, has-address, has-phone, identifier-type | 2. Save each | 3. Verify acceptance
Expected_Result: Each valid pair saves; invalid combos (missing required) are rejected consistently

Title: Nurse role cannot sign/finalize a provider-only order
Preconditions: User with Nurse role lacks order-signing privilege
Test_Steps: 1. Log in as nurse | 2. Open patient with draft order | 3. Attempt to sign/activate order
Expected_Result: Action is denied/hidden; server rejects unauthorized order activation; audit logs the attempt

Title: Privilege removal takes effect on next request (no stale session grant)
Preconditions: User logged in with a privilege that admin then revokes
Test_Steps: 1. Log in with privilege | 2. Admin revokes privilege | 3. User retries protected action
Expected_Result: After revocation the protected action is denied; cached privilege is not honored

Title: Direct URL access to admin page denied for unprivileged user
Test_Steps: 1. Log in as clinician | 2. Navigate directly to admin manage-users URL | 3. Observe response
Expected_Result: Access is forbidden/redirected; no admin data leaks; attempt is auditable

Title: Cannot create encounter dated outside the active visit window
Test_Steps: 1. Open patient with active visit | 2. Add encounter with datetime before visit start | 3. Save
Expected_Result: Encounter datetime outside visit bounds is rejected or auto-clamped per config; no orphaned obs

Title: Visit state transition: active to closed to reopen
Test_Steps: 1. End the active visit | 2. Verify visit shows stopped | 3. Reopen/restart visit if privileged | 4. Verify state
Expected_Result: State transitions active->stopped->active are persisted with correct stop/restart timestamps and audit

Title: Voiding an encounter cascades void to its observations
Test_Steps: 1. Void the encounter with a reason | 2. Query obs for that encounter | 3. Verify voided flags
Expected_Result: Encounter and all child observations are marked voided with reason and voided_by; not physically deleted

Title: Out-of-range vital triggers warning but allows override with reason
Preconditions: Clinical form with vitals validation configured
Test_Steps: 1. Enter critically high BP | 2. Observe range warning | 3. Confirm with override | 4. Save
Expected_Result: Hard/soft limits enforced per decision table; absolute-range value blocked, critical-range value warns and saves with note

Title: Boundary values at vital absolute min/max
Test_Steps: 1. Enter pulse at absolute min | 2. Enter pulse at absolute max | 3. Enter just beyond max | 4. Save each
Expected_Result: Min and max accepted; value beyond absolute max rejected with validation message

Title: Duplicate active allergen entry is prevented
Test_Steps: 1. Open allergies | 2. Add Penicillin again as active | 3. Save
Expected_Result: Duplicate active allergen is blocked or flagged; allergy list shows single active entry

Title: No-known-allergies conflicts with a specific allergen entry
Test_Steps: 1. Confirm NKA set | 2. Attempt to add a specific allergen | 3. Observe handling
Expected_Result: System resolves conflict: clearing NKA when a specific allergen is added; no contradictory state persists

Title: Diagnosis coded to ICD-10 maps correct code system
Test_Steps: 1. Add diagnosis E11.9 | 2. Save encounter | 3. Fetch Condition via FHIR | 4. Inspect coding
Expected_Result: FHIR Condition.code includes system http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10 with code E11.9 and correct display

Title: Condition clinical status transition active to resolved
Test_Steps: 1. Open condition | 2. Change status to inactive/resolved | 3. Save | 4. Verify history
Expected_Result: Status transitions active->resolved with end date; prior state retained in history; FHIR clinicalStatus updated

Title: Drug order with stop date before start date is rejected
Test_Steps: 1. Create drug order | 2. Set start=tomorrow stop=today | 3. Save
Expected_Result: Order rejected with date-sequence validation; no invalid order persisted

Title: Discontinue order references a still-active order only
Test_Steps: 1. Discontinue the active order | 2. Verify order state | 3. Attempt to discontinue the already-stopped order
Expected_Result: First discontinue succeeds and sets stopped; second discontinue of inactive order is rejected

Title: Revising an order voids prior and links via previousOrder
Test_Steps: 1. Revise dose on existing order | 2. Save | 3. Query order chain
Expected_Result: New order created with action REVISE and previous_order_id pointing to prior; prior order discontinued

Title: Lab result entry rejects value outside biologically plausible range
Preconditions: Lab order Glucose placed and results enterable
Test_Steps: 1. Open result entry | 2. Enter implausible negative glucose | 3. Save
Expected_Result: Negative/implausible result is rejected; result not committed

Title: Critical lab value flags abnormal indicator
Test_Steps: 1. Enter potassium below critical-low | 2. Enter within range | 3. Enter above critical-high | 4. Save each
Expected_Result: Below and above critical values flagged abnormal/critical; in-range value flagged normal per range table

Title: Dispense quantity cannot exceed ordered quantity
Test_Steps: 1. Open dispensing | 2. Attempt to dispense 45 tablets | 3. Save
Expected_Result: Over-dispense is blocked with quantity validation; dispense not recorded

Title: Dispense against expired medication batch is blocked
Preconditions: Stock batch with past expiry exists
Test_Steps: 1. Select expired batch for dispense | 2. Save
Expected_Result: Dispensing from expired batch is prevented with expiry validation

Title: Drug-allergy interaction alert on order for known allergen
Test_Steps: 1. Order Amoxicillin (penicillin class) | 2. Observe alert | 3. Override with reason or cancel
Expected_Result: Cross-sensitivity alert fires before order finalization; override requires documented reason; cancel aborts order

Title: Patient search by identifier returns exact match only
Preconditions: FHIR R4 endpoint enabled; patient with identifier exists
Test_Steps: 1. GET /ws/fhir2/R4/Patient?identifier=SYS|VALUE | 2. Inspect bundle
Expected_Result: Bundle returns the single matching Patient; no unrelated patients; total reflects exact match

Title: Invalid resource POST returns OperationOutcome with issue detail
Test_Steps: 1. POST malformed Observation missing status | 2. Inspect response
Expected_Result: HTTP 400/422 with OperationOutcome describing the missing required element

Title: Conditional read with If-Modified-Since returns 304
Preconditions: FHIR endpoint enabled; known Patient resource
Test_Steps: 1. GET Patient/{id} note Last-Modified | 2. GET again with If-Modified-Since equal value
Expected_Result: Server returns 304 Not Modified with no body when unchanged

Title: Bundle transaction rollback on one failing entry
Test_Steps: 1. POST transaction Bundle with one valid and one invalid entry | 2. Inspect result | 3. Verify no partial persistence
Expected_Result: Entire transaction rolls back atomically; valid entry is not persisted; OperationOutcome returned

Title: Inbound ADT^A04 registers patient with correct PID mapping
Test_Steps: 1. Send ADT^A04 message | 2. Process queue | 3. Verify patient created with mapped PID fields
Expected_Result: Patient created/updated with identifier, name, DOB and gender mapped from PID; ACK^AA returned

Title: Malformed HL7 message returns AE/AR negative acknowledgment
Test_Steps: 1. Send message with missing required MSH field | 2. Inspect ACK
Expected_Result: Negative acknowledgment (AE/AR) returned; message not processed into patient data; error queued

Title: ORU^R01 result with abnormal flag maps to obs interpretation
Test_Steps: 1. Send ORU^R01 with OBX abnormal flag H | 2. Process | 3. Verify stored interpretation
Expected_Result: Result stored with high/abnormal interpretation matching OBX-8 abnormal flag

Title: All PHI views are recorded in audit log
Test_Steps: 1. Open a patient chart as clinician | 2. View encounters | 3. Check audit/log entries
Expected_Result: Each PHI access is logged with user, patient, action, timestamp; log is tamper-evident

Title: Failed login attempts are logged with source detail
Test_Steps: 1. Attempt login with wrong password 3 times | 2. Inspect audit/security log
Expected_Result: Each failed attempt logged with username, timestamp and outcome; no password value stored

Title: Account locks after configured consecutive failed logins
Preconditions: Lockout threshold configured to N attempts
Test_Steps: 1. Fail login N times | 2. Attempt N+1 with correct password | 3. Observe
Expected_Result: Account is locked after threshold; subsequent valid login blocked until unlock window/admin reset

Title: Session expires after inactivity timeout
Test_Steps: 1. Log in | 2. Idle beyond timeout | 3. Perform a protected action
Expected_Result: Session is invalidated after idle timeout; protected action redirects to login; no PHI exposed

Title: Stored XSS in patient name field is neutralized
Test_Steps: 1. Register patient with script payload in name | 2. View patient in dashboard/search
Expected_Result: Payload is encoded/sanitized on render; no script executes; data stored safely

Title: SQL-injection-style input in search does not break query
Test_Steps: 1. Search with injection payload | 2. Observe results and logs
Expected_Result: Input treated as literal; parameterized query returns no spurious data; no error/leak

Title: Search by partial identifier returns ranked matches
Preconditions: Multiple patients with similar identifiers exist
Test_Steps: 1. Search by partial ID | 2. Review results ordering
Expected_Result: Matching patients returned with exact-prefix ranked first; no unrelated records

Title: Diacritic/accent-insensitive name search
Preconditions: Patient named Jose with accented variant exists
Test_Steps: 1. Search using non-accented spelling | 2. Review matches
Expected_Result: Accent-insensitive match returns the patient regardless of diacritics

Title: Voided patient is excluded from active search results
Test_Steps: 1. Void a patient | 2. Search for that patient | 3. Review results
Expected_Result: Voided patient does not appear in standard active search; only retrievable via admin/restore path

Title: Cancelled appointment slot becomes re-bookable
Test_Steps: 1. Cancel the appointment | 2. Book new appointment same slot | 3. Save
Expected_Result: After cancellation the slot frees and a new booking in that slot is accepted

Title: Double-booking allowed only when provider overbooking flag enabled
Test_Steps: 1. With overbooking off, attempt overlap (reject) | 2. Enable overbooking | 3. Attempt overlap (allow)
Expected_Result: Overlap rejected when off; permitted with warning when on; behavior matches decision table

Title: Charge not duplicated when encounter saved twice
Preconditions: Billing rules generate charge on encounter save
Test_Steps: 1. Save billable encounter | 2. Re-save same encounter without new services | 3. Inspect charges
Expected_Result: Charge is generated once; idempotent re-save does not create duplicate line item

Title: Insurance copay calculation by decision table of plan and service
Test_Steps: 1. Apply plan A to service X | 2. Apply plan B to service X | 3. Apply plan A to service Y | 4. Verify copay
Expected_Result: Copay computed per plan/service matrix; correct payer/patient split for each combination

Title: Refund cannot exceed original paid amount
Test_Steps: 1. Initiate refund of 120 | 2. Save | 3. Initiate refund of 100
Expected_Result: Over-refund rejected; refund equal to paid amount accepted; balance never negative

Title: Report excludes voided records from counts
Preconditions: Dataset with voided and active records
Test_Steps: 1. Run patient/encounter count report | 2. Void a record | 3. Re-run report
Expected_Result: Voided records are excluded from counts; totals decrement correctly after void

Title: Date-range report boundary inclusivity
Preconditions: Encounters on range start and end dates exist
Test_Steps: 1. Run report for 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-30 | 2. Verify records on both boundary dates
Expected_Result: Records dated exactly on start and end are included per defined inclusivity rule

Title: Concept retire hides concept from new entry but preserves history
Test_Steps: 1. Retire a concept | 2. Attempt to use in new form | 3. View historical obs
Expected_Result: Retired concept unavailable for new entry; historical observations remain intact and viewable

Title: Merge patients consolidates encounters under surviving record
Preconditions: Two duplicate patient records each with encounters
Test_Steps: 1. Initiate patient merge | 2. Choose surviving record | 3. Confirm | 4. Verify data
Expected_Result: All encounters/orders/obs reassigned to survivor; non-survivor voided; identifiers preserved; audit recorded

Title: Unmerge/rollback unavailable warning before merge confirm
Test_Steps: 1. Proceed to merge confirm | 2. Read irreversibility warning | 3. Cancel
Expected_Result: User is warned merge is not easily reversible; cancel aborts with no data change

Title: Appointment reminder not sent for cancelled appointment
Preconditions: Reminder job scheduled; appointment cancelled before send window
Test_Steps: 1. Cancel appointment | 2. Run reminder job | 3. Inspect outbound queue
Expected_Result: No reminder is generated for the cancelled appointment; active appts still get reminders

Title: Reminder respects patient opt-out preference
Test_Steps: 1. Set opt-out for SMS | 2. Trigger reminders | 3. Inspect channels used
Expected_Result: No SMS sent when opted out; email still sent if allowed; preference matrix honored

Title: Video session link is single-use/expires after visit
Preconditions: Telehealth visit with generated join link
Test_Steps: 1. Complete/close the visit | 2. Attempt to reuse the join link
Expected_Result: Expired/used link is rejected; no unauthorized session re-entry; access logged

Title: Telehealth encounter documents correct visit type and provider
Test_Steps: 1. Conduct telehealth visit | 2. Save encounter | 3. Verify visit metadata
Expected_Result: Encounter records telehealth visit type, provider and timestamp accurately

Title: Registration form fully keyboard navigable in tab order
Test_Steps: 1. Tab through all fields | 2. Reach and activate Save via keyboard | 3. Verify focus order
Expected_Result: All controls reachable in logical order; visible focus indicator; no keyboard trap; save works

Title: Form errors announced to screen readers
Test_Steps: 1. Submit form with missing required field | 2. Listen for error announcement
Expected_Result: Validation errors are programmatically associated and announced; aria-describedby/role=alert present

Title: Color contrast of critical alerts meets WCAG AA
Test_Steps: 1. Inspect alert text/background contrast | 2. Measure ratio
Expected_Result: Critical alert text meets at least 4.5:1 contrast ratio; not conveyed by color alone

Title: Patient search returns within SLA under concurrent load
Test_Steps: 1. Run 50 concurrent patient searches | 2. Measure p95 latency
Expected_Result: p95 search latency within SLA; no errors/timeouts; results remain correct

Title: Large encounter history page paginates without timeout
Test_Steps: 1. Open patient dashboard | 2. Page through encounter history
Expected_Result: History loads paginated within acceptable time; no full-page timeout or memory error

Title: REST create patient enforces same validation as UI
Test_Steps: 1. POST patient with future DOB via REST | 2. Inspect response
Expected_Result: REST rejects future DOB consistently with UI; returns 400 with validation message

Title: Unauthorized REST call without token returns 401
Test_Steps: 1. Call protected REST resource without auth | 2. Inspect status
Expected_Result: Server returns 401; no PHI returned in body

Title: Pagination limit boundary on REST collection
Test_Steps: 1. Request limit=0 | 2. Request max limit | 3. Request beyond max
Expected_Result: limit=0 handled gracefully; max returns capped page; over-max clamped to server max

Title: Concurrent edit of same patient resolves without data loss
Test_Steps: 1. Session A edits phone | 2. Session B edits address | 3. Both save
Expected_Result: Optimistic locking/last-write handling preserves both non-conflicting fields or flags conflict; no silent loss

Title: Referential integrity prevents deleting referenced concept
Test_Steps: 1. Attempt hard delete of referenced concept | 2. Observe
Expected_Result: Delete is blocked by FK/referential integrity; retire is the supported path

Title: Encounter cannot belong to two visits simultaneously
Test_Steps: 1. Move encounter to visit B while in visit A | 2. Save
Expected_Result: Encounter is associated with exactly one visit; reassignment removes prior link cleanly

Title: BMI auto-calculation regression from height and weight
Test_Steps: 1. Enter height and weight | 2. Save | 3. Verify computed BMI
Expected_Result: BMI computes to expected value (24.2) and stores with correct unit; recalculates on edit

Title: Radiology order requires reason/indication when configured
Test_Steps: 1. Place radiology order without indication | 2. Save
Expected_Result: Order blocked until indication provided; required-field validation enforced

Title: Pairwise order attribute combinations validation
Test_Steps: 1. Apply paired combos of route, frequency, PRN, duration-unit | 2. Save each
Expected_Result: Each valid combination saves; incompatible combos (e.g. PRN with fixed duration conflict) flagged

Title: Password change invalidates other active sessions
Preconditions: User logged in on two clients
Test_Steps: 1. Change password on client A | 2. Perform action on client B
Expected_Result: Other sessions are invalidated or require re-auth after password change; no stale access

Title: Login rejects valid username with trailing whitespace mismatch
Test_Steps: 1. Enter username with trailing space | 2. Enter correct password | 3. Submit
Expected_Result: Behavior is deterministic per spec (trim-and-accept or reject); documented and consistent

Title: Encounter resource references correct subject and participant
Test_Steps: 1. GET Encounter/{id} | 2. Inspect subject and participant references
Expected_Result: Encounter.subject points to correct Patient; participant references the provider Practitioner

Title: MedicationRequest status reflects discontinued order
Test_Steps: 1. Discontinue drug order | 2. GET MedicationRequest | 3. Inspect status
Expected_Result: MedicationRequest.status maps to stopped/completed consistent with order state

Title: Duplicate inbound message (same control ID) is de-duplicated
Test_Steps: 1. Send ADT message | 2. Resend identical message same MSH-10 | 3. Inspect
Expected_Result: Second identical message is recognized as duplicate and not reprocessed; single patient effect

Title: Exploratory session on concurrent visit and order edge cases
Preconditions: Test clinician with patient having active visit and orders
Test_Steps: 1. Time-boxed exploration of rapid start/stop visit, place/discontinue order, void encounter sequences | 2. Note anomalies
Expected_Result: Document defects/inconsistencies in state, audit and UI; no data corruption observed

Title: Exploratory session on identifier formats and check digits
Test_Steps: 1. Explore identifiers with edge formats, check-digit errors, max length, special chars | 2. Note handling
Expected_Result: Invalid check digits/formats rejected; valid edge formats accepted; behavior documented

Title: Prior-defect regression: gender unknown blocked save (Assumption)
Preconditions: Defect history: U gender once broke save
Test_Steps: 1. Register patient with gender Unknown | 2. Save
Expected_Result: Patient with Unknown gender saves successfully; prior save-blocking defect does not recur

Title: Prior-defect regression: discontinued order reappearing as active (Assumption)
Preconditions: Defect history: discontinued order showed active after refresh
Test_Steps: 1. Discontinue drug order | 2. Refresh dashboard | 3. Re-open patient in new session
Expected_Result: Order remains discontinued across refresh and sessions; stale active state defect does not recur

Title: Prior-defect regression: severity not persisted on edit (Assumption)
Preconditions: Defect history: allergy severity dropped on edit
Test_Steps: 1. Add allergy with severe severity | 2. Edit reaction | 3. Save and reopen
Expected_Result: Severity persists through edit; previously dropped severity defect does not recur

Title: Audit report includes user merge actions
Preconditions: Patient merges performed; audit reporting available
Test_Steps: 1. Run audit report filtered to merge events | 2. Verify entries
Expected_Result: Merge actions appear with actor, survivor/non-survivor IDs and timestamp for compliance review

Title: Pairwise dispense scenarios across stock and substitution
Test_Steps: 1. Apply paired combos of stock-level, substitution-allowed, partial-fill, controlled-substance | 2. Process
Expected_Result: Each combination produces correct dispense outcome and required approvals; controlled substances require extra auth

Title: State transition of invoice draft to posted to paid to void
Test_Steps: 1. Create draft invoice | 2. Post | 3. Record payment to paid | 4. Attempt void of paid invoice
Expected_Result: Valid transitions persist with timestamps; voiding a paid invoice requires reversal/credit not silent delete
